name: update_event
description: Update fields of an existing event on the operator's Google Calendar (a partial patch — only the fields you supply are changed). Identify the event by event_id. start/end accept an RFC3339 datetime OR an all-day date, same as create_event. Returns the updated event.

event_id.description: The event id to update (from list_events).

start.description: Optional. New start. RFC3339 datetime (contains 'T') for a timed event, OR an all-day date.

end.description: Optional. New end. Same format as start.

attendees.description: Optional. Replacement list of attendee email addresses.

calendar_id.description: Optional. Calendar id the event lives on (default 'primary').

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON of the updated event (or an error string).
notes: Requires Google Workspace connected for the operator. This is a partial patch: only the fields you pass are changed; omitted fields are left as-is. start/end follow the same datetime-vs-all-day-date rule as create_event. Supplying attendees REPLACES the attendee list. Get the event_id from list_events.
